title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at IndiaMart Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at IndiaMart Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at IndiaMart Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IndiaMart Advisory Limited:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart Advisory Limited!
